capital_allocation._doc: Weights determine max capital allocation per pair. Pairs below min_sharpe_for_trading are data-only (model still trains, no entries). The strategy reads rolling 14-day Sharpe from trade_journal at bot_loop_start cadence; when fewer than `rebalance_after_days` of live data exist the trained val_sharpe is used as a bootstrap. Auto-rebalance recomputes weights on the rebalance_after_days schedule.

regime_gating._doc: Per-regime tuning. entry_delta values are added to entry_threshold; exit_delta values are added to exit_threshold. null means 'hard-block long entries in this regime'. Override at runtime with FREQTRADE__REGIME_GATING__<KEY> env vars. AGGRESSIVE first-30-day stance for $1k/mo target — risk_management floor (8% DD, 3% daily, 5-loss breaker, Kelly 0.5) is unchanged.

ept_evolution._doc: EPT evolution — accelerated cadence for first-30-day push toward champion convergence. Larger population (12) for diversity; tighter cycle (12h train + 24h eval = 36h gen) for faster generations. risk_governor still gates every trade.

sentiment_sources._doc: Per-source weights for the sentiment ensemble. The LLM scorers (Hermes-3 70B + 8B) read all sources together; weights are advisory for downstream consumers (e.g. market_research skill divergence checks). Six free sources, zero external API costs (Perplexity is freemium — gracefully degrades if PERPLEXITY_API_KEY is unset).

cryptocurrency_cv._note: disabled 2026-05-09: source switched to paid-only, returns HTTP 402

sentiment_pipeline._doc: Sentiment-engine knobs that used to be hardcoded constants. All overridable via env vars (SENTIMENT_*) at runtime.

news_sources_config._doc: Per-source endpoint config. Edit here (no code change) to add/remove subreddits, RSS feeds, or change watched pair symbols. Aggregator reads this on each poll cycle (15 min cadence).

data._doc: Live view of config.json + selected env vars. Edit config via the regime-params editor or by committing config.json. Secret env vars are reported as '<set>' / null only.
